headline: A Look At Nasdaq (NDAQ) Valuation After Faster Nasdaq 100 Entry Rule For Large New Listings
summary: Nasdaq (NDAQ) is drawing fresh attention after approving changes to the Nasdaq 100 Index methodology, including a new fast entry rule that lets large newly public companies join within 15 trading days. See our latest analysis for Nasdaq. Against this backdrop of index rule changes and growing focus on digital assets, Nasdaq’s 1-year total shareholder return of 11.44% contrasts with a year-to-date share price return of negative 13.59%. This suggests that longer term holders have fared better...
